full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Checking report structure and submission requirements
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Does my IEEE-style LaTeX report cover all required sections? It should include an abstract, introduction, method overview, dataset setup, reproduction results, ablation study, failure mode analysis, discussion, conclusion, and references. It must fit within 4 pages excluding references.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Confirmed that the report contains all required sections in the correct order and that the content fits within the 4-page constraint. Also verified that figure references, table captions, and the bibliography entry are properly formatted for IEEEtran.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: I compiled the LaTeX file to PDF and visually confirmed the page count, section ordering, and that all figures and tables render correctly with proper captions and cross-references.
